subcodes.first_line: O divine Afnan! The letter thou didst address to Jinab-i-Áqá Siyyid Taqí was perused [3.5s]... ...On the day of the martyrdom of the Bab, may My life be a sacrifice to His dust, circumambulate the sanctified Haram [the House of the Bab] on My behalf and, with the greatest reverence and fervor
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان الهی مکتوبی که بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گشت از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrdom of the Bab, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
